testcase.name: test_api[GET /api/v1/account/projects]

failure.message: schemathesis.core.errors.IncorrectUsage: The `base_url` argument is required when specifying a schema via a file, so Schemathesis knows where to send the data. Pass `base_url` either to the `schemathesis.openapi.from_*` loader or to the `Case.call`. If you use the ASGI integration, please supply your test client as the `session` argument to `call`. URL: /api/v1/account/projects

testcase.failure: E schemathesis.core.errors.IncorrectUsage: The `base_url` argument is required when specifying a schema via a file, so Schemathesis knows where to send the data. Pass `base_url` either to the `schemathesis.openapi.from_*` loader or to the `Case.call`. If you use the ASGI integration, please supply your test client as the `session` argument to `call`. URL: /api/v1/account/projects
